nodes.name: InfluencerSoft → add subscriber
nodes.notes: InfluencerSoft endpoint path is a placeholder — confirm exact path from kebron.influencersoft.com API docs (most likely /api/v1/subscribers or /api/v1/contacts). The `neverError` option keeps the workflow alive if IS rejects (e.g., duplicate email) — the email + Sheets backup still fire.

nodes.name: SMTP → deliver PDF link
nodes.notes: Swap to a Resend/Postmark HTTP node post-launch when volume justifies a transactional ESP. SMTP via Hostinger Business is fine for sub-100 emails/day at launch.

nodes.name: Sheets → leads backup
nodes.notes: Belt-and-suspenders: if IS or SMTP ever fail silently, the Sheet has every lead. Create one sheet at ops/google-sheets/leads.xlsx with the 9 header row above.
